title: Badla
tmdbOverview: A dynamic young entrepreneur finds herself locked in a hotel room with the corpse of her dead lover. She hires a prestigious lawyer to defend her and they work together to figure out what actually happened.
synopsis: Released in 2019, Badla is a crime, thriller and mystery film from India. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 14 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
